Smaller, more cyclical IT services peer (in input).
Indian IT services peer (NOT in input data).

value_picks.analyst_take: Cleanest value setup in the cohort - 6/6 framework score with dividend, net cash, and a 33% PE discount to consensus. Earnings growth 22% combined with FCF yield 7.3% makes this the rare cheap+growing IT services name. Main risk is the AI-substitution narrative bleeding into outsourcing budgets, but the price already discounts much of that.

short_dynamics.detail: Short interest 2.03% (<5%) AND declining 10.55% MoM — clean tape, no bear pressure.

Analyst distribution skewed bullish: 17 buy/strong-buy vs 4 hold/sell

downside_scenarios.scenario: Pullback to SMA20 ($113.67) on gold price consolidation

Analyst low target — would require sharp gold price collapse and cost inflation

ideal_entry.reasoning: Retest of SMA20/SMA50 zone ($113.67 / $114.77) provides risk-defined entry with ~25% upside to mean target.

Operating leverage on the gold price tape is doing real work in earnings (EG 79% > RG 46%). Core position-able for a gold-bullish view; downside cushioned by SMA support and FCF yield.
